title: Physics Engine & Collisions
description: Configure collision profiles, object channels, line traces, raycasts, and physics materials.
learningObjectives: Differentiate collision options: Ignore, Overlap, and Block
Configure custom Collision Object Channels and Trace Presets
Perform Single Line Traces by Channel to detect hit results in gameplay code

sections.title: Collisions and Trace Channels
sections.content:
Unreal's physics engine manages physical simulation and intersection queries. Collision behaviors are:

1. **Ignore**: No overlap events or physics blocks.
2. **Overlap**: Generates trigger events (OverlapBegin) but permits penetration. Used for sensors.
3. **Block**: Prevents penetration. Triggers hit events. Used for solid geometry.

Raycasting (Line Traces) queries spatial corridors to detect targets (e.g. gun shooting mechanics check if trace hits a target box).

sections.title: Line Trace for Gun Hits
